title: aidia micrantha
intro: Aidia micrantha, also known as the small-leaf aidia or small-leaf maham, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aidia micrantha include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. Aidia micrantha can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, capsules, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
